days.headline: On-device AI inference surges with Google LiteRT-LM and AI Edge Gallery; NousResearch Hermes-Agent and NVIDIA PersonaPlex dominate GitHub trending; agent memory and autonomous agent frameworks emerge as the week's defining infrastructure theme

Steerable visual representations and LLM pre-decision biases challenge core assumptions; multi-agent evolution frameworks and adversarial 3D textures push agent capabilities and risks; Gemma-4 and Claude-distilled Qwen dominate trending models
